record.field:
project_ids = env['project.project'].search(['|', ('project_status_id', '=', False), ('project_status_id.code', 'not in', ['dead', 'duplicate', 'internal', 'internal_p2p3'])]) employee_ids = env['hr.employee'].search( [('exclude_from_timesheet_quality_control', '=', False)]) today = datetime.date.today() firstday_of_the_month = today.replace(day=1) quality_category_ids = env['quality.category'].search([]) for employee_id in employee_ids: quality_issue_log_ids = env['quality.issue.log'].search( [('create_date', '>=', firstday_of_the_month), ('state', '=', 'enabled'), ('employee_id', '=', employee_id.id)]) goal_id = env['gamification.goal'].search( [('user_id', '=', employee_id.user_id.id), ('start_date', '<=', today), ('end_date', '>=', today), ('state', '!=', 'canceled')], limit=1)
quality_data = [] list_of_quality_category_id = [] weight = 0 quality_score = 0
for quality_category_id in quality_category_ids: categ_quality_score = 100 for issue_type in quality_issue_log_ids.quality_issue_type.filtered( lambda type: type.quality_category.id == quality_category_id.id): issue_score_impact = sum(iss.score_impact for iss in quality_issue_log_ids.filtered( lambda issue: issue.quality_issue_type.id == issue_type.id)) categ_quality_score -= issue_score_impact
if categ_quality_score > 0: quality_category_id.check_role(employee_id, project_ids, quality_data, categ_quality_score, list_of_quality_category_id, weight, quality_score) else: quality_category_id.check_role(employee_id, project_ids, quality_data, 0, list_of_quality_category_id, weight, quality_score)
message = "" for data in quality_data: weight += data.get('weight') quality_score += data.get('quality_score') if data.get('message'): message += data.get('message') if weight > 0: if goal_id: goal_id.write( {'quality_score_message': message, 'global_quality_score': (quality_score / weight) * 100}) employee_id.write( {'quality_score_message': message, 'global_quality_score': (quality_score / weight) * 100}) else: if goal_id: goal_id.write( {'quality_score_message': False, 'global_quality_score': 0.0}) employee_id.write({'quality_score_message': False, 'global_quality_score': 0.0})
